005 - WHAT WE OFFER

Services for
project partners.

What protocols get when they work with the EGO collective.

01

Product Testing

Hands-on testing from active users who actually ship - bugs, UX gaps and edge cases surfaced before your public launch.

02

Founder Feedback

Direct, candid input straight to the founding team. Positioning, tokenomics and roadmap pressure-tested by people who've seen the cycles.

03

Narrative Support

We help craft and carry the story - threads, spaces and content that frame your project the right way across CT.

04

Traction

Real distribution through a curated network. Awareness that converts into users, communities and momentum that compounds.

006 - EVENTS

crew shows up.
